Package org.apache.axis2.json.moshih2

package org.apache.axis2.json.moshih2
  • Related Packages

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    EnhancedMoshiJsonBuilder
    Enhanced Moshi JSON Builder with HTTP/2 Optimization Concepts (moshi-h2).
    EnhancedMoshiJsonBuilder.ProcessingStrategy
    Processing strategy configuration class (extracted from HTTP/2 integration patterns).
    EnhancedMoshiJsonFormatter
    Enhanced Moshi JSON Formatter with HTTP/2 Optimization Concepts.
    EnhancedMoshiXMLStreamReader
    Enhanced Moshi XML Stream Reader with Field-Specific Optimizations from HTTP/2 Integration.
    EnhancedMoshiXMLStreamReader.FieldOptimizationStats
    Field optimization statistics tracking.
    JsonProcessingMetrics
    Performance Metrics Collection for Enhanced Moshi H2 JSON Processing.
    JsonProcessingMetrics.FieldProcessingStats
    Field-level processing statistics (extracted from HTTP/2 field processing optimization analysis).
    JsonProcessingMetrics.Statistics
    Comprehensive statistics data class (based on HTTP/2 StreamingMetrics).
